app.title: GeoGrid Planner
app.subtitle: Geometry and grid calculator for 2D shapes

home.title: Calculate shapes, grids, intersections, and derived metrics.
home.description: The project is structured to gradually add new shapes, metrics, and visualization modes without rewriting the whole calculation flow.
home.triangleDescription: Triangle sides, main side, grid, intersections, area, and perimeter.
home.trapezoidDescription: Four-side trapezoid, main side selection, grid lines, and intersections.

footer.disclaimer: Calculations may include rounding errors or depend on the entered data. For important engineering decisions, verify the results independently.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Language, units, and precision are moved out because they usually change less often than shape parameters.

triangle.description: Calculate a triangle by three sides with main side selection, grid building, and filtering intersections near sides.
triangle.invalid: A triangle or grid cannot be built from these values.
triangle.title: Triangle calculator

trapezoid.description: Calculate a trapezoid by sides AB, BC, CD, DA. AB and CD are treated as parallel bases.
trapezoid.invalid: A trapezoid or grid cannot be built from these values. Check sides and grid step.
trapezoid.title: Trapezoid calculator

preview.simplified: Preview is simplified: all data is included in calculations, but not every line or point is rendered for performance.
